description_long: This object is a firearm with a wooden stock and a dark metallic barrel, receiver, and drum magazine. The stock is robust and smoothly contoured, showing a natural wood grain finish, while the rest of the body is constructed from metal with a matte, slightly worn appearance. The barrel is long and cylindrical, featuring a series of vent holes along the upper handguard, and is attached to a prominent round drum magazine beneath the receiver. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a standard trigger, with the trigger assembly integrated into the lower receiver. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century military firearms, with utilitarian lines and a focus on durability. The object is detailed with visible screws, seams, and mechanical components, suggesting functional realism.
description: A military-style shotgun with a wooden stock, dark metal barrel, and a large drum magazine. The design features vented barrel details and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular drum magazine and the end of the barrel, with the wooden stock visible behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the wooden stock, the metal receiver, the vented barrel, and the drum magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the stock and the circular shape of the drum magazine, with the barrel extending forward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal receiver, vented barrel, and drum magazine from the other side.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
